message:
Three-way playground: REST + capnweb + capnwasm side-by-side

Added capnweb as the third column. Runs through capnweb's own
serialize/deserialize over the same fetch path so it's an
apples-to-apples comparison. Numbers from prod build (vite preview)
on localhost:

  small (200 records × 32 B avatar):
    REST/JSON  107 ms  (30.9 KB)   ← winner
    capnweb    108 ms  (32.7 KB)
    capnwasm   110 ms  (26.6 KB)

  blob (50 records × 4 KB avatar):
    REST/JSON  15.1 ms (272 KB)    ← tied
    capnweb    15.1 ms (273 KB)
    capnwasm   15.1 ms (205 KB)

Honest result: on localhost the three are within 0–3% of each other.
capnwasm sends fewer bytes (the binary wire wins on size) but the
wasm load + per-record decode cost roughly cancels the bytes savings
when the network has zero latency. The summary text says exactly
this and points at the honest comparison doc for where each one
actually wins.

Other fixes in this commit:
- Single-flight gate on runBench so the auto-run-on-load and an
  explicit click can't race (was producing bogus 200-fetches-aborted
  numbers in playwright tests).
- Landing-page headline numbers retired the over-confident
  "capnwasm wins this workload" claim — replaced with "essentially
  tied — localhost network dominates" plus the in-process bench
  numbers (3.2× burst, 3.8× big-payload) which are still honest.
- Generate-fixtures script emits the .cwb files alongside .json/.capnp.

files.patch:
@@ -20,26 +20,30 @@

capnwasm

-

vs capnweb (in-process bench, Apple Silicon)

+

vs capnweb & REST/JSON

- Burst 1000 calls (per-call) - 2.5 μs — 3.2x faster + In-browser fetch+render (any workload) + essentially tied — localhost network dominates
- 64 KB text echo round-trip - 96 μs — 3.8x faster + Burst 1000 RPC calls (in-process, per-call) + 2.5 μs — 3.2x faster than capnweb
- Single tiny RPC call - 8.5 μs — 1.75x faster + 64 KB text echo round-trip (in-process) + 96 μs — 3.8x faster than capnweb +
+
+ Wire bytes for 4 KB binary blob (gzip) + 2.4× smaller than JSON / capnweb
Bundle (JS + wasm, gzip) - 44 KB — 2.1x larger + 44 KB — 2.1x larger than capnweb
Cold start (init + first call) - ~3 ms — 15x slower + ~3 ms — 15x slower than capnweb
